input.title: Superscript not positioned correctly on meta attribute
input.body:
## Steps to Reproduce

```
- A
  - =test
- B
  - =test
```

1. Set the cursor on `A`
2. Activate `toggleHiddenThoughts`

## Current Behavior

Superscript is not positioned correctly. 

Probably caused by the monospace font that is used for meta attributes. 

![image](https://github.com/cybersemics/em/assets/750276/bef66ad3-5e97-41c8-8a3f-3b5592141e0f)

## Expected Behavior

Superscript should be positioned correctly regardless of the thought font.
